hero.subtitle: Map the route, own each day, share the costs, and keep a trip-aware AI in the loop — all in one place.
hero.trust: Free to start · Japan · Autumn demo included
hero.imageAlt: OpenTrip desktop map of the Japan · Autumn trip

map.title: See the whole route
map.body: Numbered stops on a live map, filtered by day, with weather and one-tap place search.
map.imageAlt: Map itinerary with numbered stops and per-day routes

schedule.title: Own every day
schedule.body: A column per day keeps timing, transit segments, and stays readable at a glance.
schedule.imageAlt: Day-by-day schedule board with stop cards

budget.title: Settle up, fairly
budget.body: Log who paid what; OpenTrip balances it and finds the fewest transfers to settle — in any currency.
budget.imageAlt: Shared expenses with per-member balances and settle-up transfers

agent.title: Ask the trip agent
agent.body: A shared assistant answers questions and applies changes only after someone approves.
agent.imageAlt: Trip agent chat suggesting itinerary changes

collaborate.title: Decide as a crew
collaborate.body: Votes, comments, and invite links live on every stop, so the whole group stays in sync.
collaborate.imageAlt: Stop detail with votes, comments, and costs

mobile.title: Take it anywhere
mobile.body: An installable PWA and a WeChat shell put the same trip in everyone's pocket.

cta.title: Your crew is ready when you are.
cta.subtitle: Create an account and the seed trip opens right away.

footer.tagline: Made for people who travel with friends.
